results.rendered_html:
maurvī [mūrvālatā tattaṃtunā nirvṛttā aṇ]
1
1 A bow-string; maurvīkiṇāṃko bhujaḥ  Ś. 1. 13 ; maurvī dhanuṣi cātatā  R. 1. 19 ; 18. 48 ;  Ku. 3. 55. 
2 A girdle made of Mūrvā grass (to be worn by a kṣatriya);  Ms. 2. 42. 
3 (In geom.) The chord of an arc; (also maurvikā).
